name: Dossier
description: The overall Education Evidence Dossier publication or graph root.

name: Dichotomy
description: A philosophical education reform debate represented as an evidence continuum.

name: Continuum Position
description: Editorial synthesis position, uncertainty band, and confidence for a dichotomy.

name: Initiative
description: A reform, policy, program, intervention, or research infrastructure item.

name: Source
description: A study, report, review, data source, or institution page cited by the dossier.

name: Method
description: A research design, evidence concept, input variable, or outcome normalization concept.

name: Evidence Claim
description: A sourced claim or synthesis statement displayed in the dossier.

name: Topic
description: A topical grouping such as Literacy, Technology, Finance, or Governance.

name: Evidence Strength
description: A normalized evidence-strength category used across claims, sources, and initiatives.

name: Research Design
description: An evaluation method tag such as RCT, Lottery, or Difference-in-differences.

name: Outcome
description: An output family or metric used to judge an initiative or claim.

name: Input Variable
description: An input family changed by an initiative or considered in normalization.
